companyName: Guardian Metal Resources PLC Sponsored ADR
description: Guardian Metal Resources Plc engages in mining activities in the jurisdiction of Nevada. It focuses on making strategic metal discoveries across its broad project portfolio. Its projects include Pilot Mountain, Tempiute, Golconda, Garfield, Kibby Basin, and Stonewall. The company was founded on April 22, 2021 and is headquartered in London, the United Kingdom.
